# Quality control {#sec-qc}

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
options(warn = 2)
targets::tar_source()
targets::tar_load(qc_figures)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())
qc <- qc_figures

fmt_n <- function(x) {
  vapply(x, function(v) {
    if (is.infinite(v)) return("Inf")
    if (abs(v - round(v)) < 1e-9) {
      return(format(as.integer(round(v)), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE))
    }
    format(round(v, 3), nsmall = 3, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
  }, FUN.VALUE = character(1))
}
fmt_range <- function(lo, hi) paste0(fmt_n(lo), "-", fmt_n(hi))
wrap_lab <- function(x, width = 18L) {
  vapply(strwrap(x, width = width, simplify = FALSE), paste, collapse = "\n", FUN.VALUE = character(1))
}
metric_lab <- function(x) {
  c(nCount_RNA = "UMIs", nFeature_RNA = "detected genes", percent_mt = "mitochondrial %",
    percent_ribo = "ribosomal %", percent_malat1 = "MALAT1 %",
    percent_contam = "contamination %")[x]
}
genotype_labels <- c(MAPTKI = "MAPTKI", P301S = "P301S",
                     NLGF_MAPTKI = "NLGF + MAPTKI",
                     NLGF_P301S = "NLGF + P301S")
sample_key_row <- qc$modality_table$modality == "proteomics sample key"
metric_names <- metric_lab(qc$metric_bounds$metric)
stopifnot(
  is.list(qc),
  all(c("modality_table", "geomx_genotype", "genotype_batch", "depth_distribution",
        "fraction_distribution", "metric_bounds", "audit_notes") %in% names(qc)),
  nrow(qc$modality_table) == 5L,
  sum(sample_key_row) == 1L,
  !anyNA(metric_names),
  nrow(qc$geomx_genotype) == 4L,
  nrow(qc$genotype_batch) == 16L,
  length(unique(qc$genotype_batch$batch)) == 4L,
  all(qc$genotype_batch$Freq > 0),
  sum(qc$geomx_genotype$n_aoi) == 91L,
  qc$modality_table$n_samples[sample_key_row] == 16L,
  all(qc$metric_bounds$within),
  all(qc$metric_bounds$n_na == 0L)
)
```

## snRNAseq microglia: quality metrics

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-depth
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-cap: "Total counts and detected genes stay finite across genotypes."
#| fig-alt: "Binned log10 total-count and detected-gene distributions by genotype."
depth_bins <- qc$depth_distribution
depth_bins$genotype <- factor(as.character(depth_bins$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
depth_bins$metric <- factor(depth_bins$metric, levels = c("total counts", "detected genes"))
depth_width <- median(diff(sort(unique(depth_bins$x_mid))))
ggplot(depth_bins, aes(x_mid, n, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_col(width = depth_width * 0.92) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ genotype, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "log10 count", y = "nuclei", title = "Library size and complexity")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-fractions
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-cap: "Mitochondrial, ribosomal, MALAT1 and contamination fractions remain bounded."
#| fig-alt: "Binned percentage-quality distributions by genotype."
frac_bins <- qc$fraction_distribution
frac_bins$genotype <- factor(as.character(frac_bins$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
frac_bins$metric <- factor(frac_bins$metric, levels = c("mitochondrial %", "ribosomal %",
                                                        "MALAT1 %", "contamination %"))
frac_width <- median(diff(sort(unique(frac_bins$x_mid))))
ggplot(frac_bins, aes(x_mid, n, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_col(width = frac_width * 0.92) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ genotype, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "% of nucleus counts", y = "nuclei", title = "Quality fractions")
```
